tasks.summary: Implement a simple greeting function that returns a configurable or default greeting message.
tasks.description: Add a single greeting function to the codebase. The function should accept an optional name (or similar) parameter and return a string such as 'Hello, {name}!' or 'Hello, World!' when no name is given. Document the module or file where it lives and how to invoke it from the rest of the app or tests.
tasks.objective: Deliver a minimal, testable greeting function as the first deliverable of the test plan.
requirements: Default greeting (e.g. Hello, World!) when no name is provided.
Function is exported and callable from tests or app.
constraints: No new external dependencies unless already in the project.
Place in an appropriate module or file per project structure.
